metadata.name: Container Registries Tasks
metadata.description: This module deploys an Azure Container Registry (ACR) Task that can be used to automate container image builds and other workflows ([ref](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/container-registry/container-registry-tasks-overview)).
Optional. Enables system assigned managed identity on the resource.
Optional. The resource ID(s) to assign to the resource.
The type for managed identities on a task.
Required. The operating system type required for the run.
Optional. The OS architecture.
Optional. Variant of the CPU.
The type for the platform properties.
Optional. The Docker build step properties.
Optional. The encoded task step properties.
Optional. The file task step properties.
The type for the task step. Exactly one of dockerBuild, encodedTask, or fileTask must be provided.
Required. The Docker file path relative to the source context.
Optional. The URL (absolute or relative) of the source context for the task step.
Optional. The token (git PAT or SAS token of storage account blob) associated with the context.
Optional. The fully qualified image names including the repository and tag.
Optional. The value of this property indicates whether the image built should be pushed to the registry or not.
Optional. The value of this property indicates whether the image cache is enabled or not.
Optional. The name of the target build stage for the docker build.
Optional. The collection of override arguments to be used when executing this build step.
The type for a Docker build step.
Required. Base64 encoded value of the template/definition file content.
Optional. Base64 encoded value of the parameters/values file content.
Optional. The URL (absolute or relative) of the source context for the task step.
Optional. The token (git PAT or SAS token of storage account blob) associated with the context.
Optional. The collection of overridable values that can be passed when running a task.
The type for an encoded task step.
Required. The task template/definition file path relative to the source context.
Optional. The URL (absolute or relative) of the source context for the task step.
Optional. The token (git PAT or SAS token of storage account blob) associated with the context.
Optional. The collection of overridable values that can be passed when running a task.
Optional. The task values/parameters file path relative to the source context.
The type for a file task step.
Optional. The trigger based on base image dependencies.
Optional. The collection of triggers based on source code repository.
Optional. The collection of timer triggers.
The type for the trigger properties of a task.
Required. The name of the trigger.
Required. The type of the auto trigger for base image dependency updates.
Optional. The current status of trigger.
The type for a base image trigger.
Required. The name of the trigger.
Required. The properties that describe the source (code) for the task.
Required. The source event corresponding to the trigger.
Optional. The current status of trigger.
The type for a source trigger.
Required. The full URL to the source code repository.
Required. The type of source control service.
Optional. The branch name of the source code.
Optional. The authorization properties for accessing the source code repository.
The type for the source properties of a task trigger.
Required. The access token used to access the source control provider.
Required. The type of Auth token.
Optional. Time in seconds that the token remains valid.
Optional. The refresh token used to refresh the access token.
Optional. The scope of the access token.
The type for the auth info of source control.
Required. The name of the trigger.
Required. The CRON expression for the task schedule.
Optional. The current status of trigger.
The type for a timer trigger.
Required. The name of the argument.
Required. The value of the argument.
Optional. Flag to indicate whether the argument represents a secret and want to be removed from build logs.
The type for a build argument.
Required. The name of the overridable value.
Required. The overridable value.
Optional. Flag to indicate whether the value represents a secret or not.
The type for an overridable value.
Optional. The CPU configuration in terms of number of cores required for the run.
The type for the agent properties.
Optional. Describes the credential parameters for accessing the source registry.
Optional. Describes the credential parameters for accessing other custom registries.
The type for the credentials used during task invocation.
Optional. The authentication mode which determines the source registry login scope.
The type for source registry credentials.
Conditional. The name of the parent registry. Required if the template is used in a standalone deployment.
Required. The name of the task.
Optional. Location for all resources.
Optional. Tags of the resource.
Optional. The platform properties against which the task has to run.
Optional. The task step properties. Exactly one of dockerBuildStep, encodedTaskStep, or fileTaskStep must be provided.
Optional. The properties that describe all triggers for the task.
Optional. The current status of task.
Optional. Run timeout in seconds.
Optional. The machine configuration of the run agent.
Optional. The dedicated agent pool for the task.
Optional. The properties that describe the credentials that will be used when the task is invoked.
Optional. The value of this property indicates whether the task resource is system task or not.
Optional. The template that describes the repository and tag information for run log artifact.
Optional. The managed identity definition for this resource.
Optional. Enable/Disable usage telemetry for module.

variables.formattedUserAssignedIdentities: [reduce(map(coalesce(tryGet(parameters('managedIdentities'), 'userAssignedResourceIds'), createArray()), lambda('id', createObject(format('{0}', lambdaVariables('id')), createObject()))), createObject(), lambda('cur', 'next', union(lambdaVariables('cur'), lambdaVariables('next'))))]
variables.identity: [if(not(empty(parameters('managedIdentities'))), createObject('type', if(coalesce(tryGet(parameters('managedIdentities'), 'systemAssigned'), false()), if(not(empty(coalesce(tryGet(parameters('managedIdentities'), 'userAssignedResourceIds'), createObject()))), 'SystemAssigned, UserAssigned', 'SystemAssigned'), if(not(empty(coalesce(tryGet(parameters('managedIdentities'), 'userAssignedResourceIds'), createObject()))), 'UserAssigned', 'None')), 'userAssignedIdentities', if(not(empty(variables('formattedUserAssignedIdentities'))), variables('formattedUserAssignedIdentities'), null())), null())]
variables.stepProperties: [if(not(equals(tryGet(parameters('step'), 'dockerBuild'), null())), createObject('type', 'Docker', 'dockerFilePath', parameters('step').dockerBuild.dockerFilePath, 'contextPath', tryGet(tryGet(parameters('step'), 'dockerBuild'), 'contextPath'), 'contextAccessToken', tryGet(tryGet(parameters('step'), 'dockerBuild'), 'contextAccessToken'), 'imageNames', tryGet(tryGet(parameters('step'), 'dockerBuild'), 'imageNames'), 'isPushEnabled', tryGet(tryGet(parameters('step'), 'dockerBuild'), 'isPushEnabled'), 'noCache', tryGet(tryGet(parameters('step'), 'dockerBuild'), 'noCache'), 'target', tryGet(tryGet(parameters('step'), 'dockerBuild'), 'target'), 'arguments', tryGet(tryGet(parameters('step'), 'dockerBuild'), 'arguments')), if(not(equals(tryGet(parameters('step'), 'encodedTask'), null())), createObject('type', 'EncodedTask', 'encodedTaskContent', parameters('step').encodedTask.encodedTaskContent, 'encodedValuesContent', tryGet(tryGet(parameters('step'), 'encodedTask'), 'encodedValuesContent'), 'contextPath', tryGet(tryGet(parameters('step'), 'encodedTask'), 'contextPath'), 'contextAccessToken', tryGet(tryGet(parameters('step'), 'encodedTask'), 'contextAccessToken'), 'values', tryGet(tryGet(parameters('step'), 'encodedTask'), 'values')), if(not(equals(tryGet(parameters('step'), 'fileTask'), null())), createObject('type', 'FileTask', 'taskFilePath', parameters('step').fileTask.taskFilePath, 'contextPath', tryGet(tryGet(parameters('step'), 'fileTask'), 'contextPath'), 'contextAccessToken', tryGet(tryGet(parameters('step'), 'fileTask'), 'contextAccessToken'), 'values', tryGet(tryGet(parameters('step'), 'fileTask'), 'values'), 'valuesFilePath', tryGet(tryGet(parameters('step'), 'fileTask'), 'valuesFilePath')), null())))]

metadata.description: The name of the task.
The name of the resource group the task was deployed into.
The resource ID of the task.
The location the resource was deployed into.
The principal ID of the system assigned identity.
